title: 151 Fantastic Elastic Flexible Wateproof Glue
features: WATERPROOF FLEXIBLE GLUE: 151 Fantastic Elastic Glue, a unique formula makes the glue resistant to shock impact, water and extreme temperatures. Repair and fix 100's of items in the home, office, shed or garage.
BONDS & SEALS: 151 Fantastic Elastic Glue, ideal for metal, glass, ceramics, leather, vinyl & fabrics. Ready to use, adjustable for up to 5 minutes.
MS POLYMER TECHNOLOGY: 151 Fantastic Elastic Glue, produces a unique, flexible bond & seal using MS Polymer Technology.
HOW TO USE: Protect work area at all times. Ensure surfaces are clean and dry before application. Warning: Protect skin, bonds skin and eyes in seconds.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, re-sealable 20g tube. Store at room temperature
